subject: Renewal + add-on discussion
body:
Hi, we plan to renew and add the AI module. Please schedule a meeting next week to discuss the specific plan.

Director Zhou

subject: Still the same old issue
body:
Hi, the report issue we reported last time still has not been fixed. We are reconsidering whether to renew.

Manager Li

subject: Renewal conditions inquiry
body:
Hi, we have several conditions for renewal:
1. Add compliance reporting feature
2. Upgrade SLA from 99.5% to 99.9%
3. Keep pricing unchanged

Please evaluate.

Director Chen

subject: Parking garage maintenance notice
body: Underground parking garage maintenance this weekend.
